# rules.md
# GSAP Animated Website — Aurora Global Hackathon
# Theme: Light Formula L2 (Cool Minimal Light) + Electric Indigo accent — keywords: bold, editorial, global, high-energy, premium
# Color formula used: Formula L2: Cool Minimal Light, accent shifted from indigo to deep violet-blue to match Aurora's sci-fi/innovation tone
# Generated by projectGRID gsap-website skill

---

## SETUP — Run this first, before any file is created

```bash
npx skills add https://github.com/greensock/gsap-skills
```

---

## Library Stack — Copy-paste into every HTML file before </body>

```html
<!-- Lenis smooth scroll -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@studio-freight/lenis@1.0.42/dist/lenis.min.js"></script>

<!-- GSAP core + plugins -->
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/gsap.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/SplitText.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/MorphSVGPlugin.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/DrawSVGPlugin.min.js"></script>

<!-- Barba.js page transitions -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@barba/core@2.9.7/dist/barba.umd.js"></script>
```

Initialize in this exact order:
```js
gsap.config({ nullTargetWarn: false });
gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger, SplitText, MorphSVGPlugin, DrawSVGPlugin);
ScrollTrigger.normalizeScroll(true);

const lenis = new Lenis();
lenis.on('scroll', ScrollTrigger.update);
gsap.ticker.add((time) => lenis.raf(time * 1000));
gsap.ticker.lagSmoothing(0);

// Then: custom cursor, then Barba, then section ScrollTrigger scenes
```

---

## Project Brief

**Site purpose:** Aurora — projectGRID's flagship global hackathon. Multi-stage innovation pipeline. 7,000-15,000 registrations, 50+ countries. Hosted in partnership with IIIT Delhi. Prize pool Rs 20 lakh.
**Sections:** Hero, About Aurora, Timeline/Stages, Prizes, Judges/Partners, Sponsors, Register CTA, Footer
**Key CTAs:** Register Now (primary), View on Devpost (secondary), Join Discord
**Tone:** Premium, editorial, high-energy, institutionally credible. Like a Bloomberg editorial crossed with a global summit. Plain text, bold type, zero decoration.

---

## Color System

All values as CSS custom properties. No hardcoded hex values anywhere in the codebase except inside :root.
The palette follows the 60-30-10 rule: 60% dominant surfaces, 30% secondary structure, 10% accent.
One accent color. All text/background pairs verified at WCAG AA minimum.

```css
/* Font imports — place in <head> */
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@700;800&family=Inter:wght@300;400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

:root {
  /* ── 60% Dominant surfaces ─────────────────── */
  --color-bg:        #F8F8FA;   /* cool off-white — NOT #FFFFFF */
  --color-surface-1: #EFEFF4;   /* cards, panels — slightly darker */
  --color-surface-2: #E5E5EC;   /* hover states */
  --color-surface-3: #DCDCE6;   /* modals, overlays */

  /* ── 30% Secondary / structure ─────────────── */
  --color-border:    #D8D8E2;   /* subtle separators */
  --color-border-2:  #C8C8D6;   /* visible dividers */
  --color-muted:     #6A6A80;   /* labels, captions — 4.7:1 on bg, passes AA */
  --color-subtle:    #EEEEF5;   /* de-emphasized bg areas */

  /* ── 10% Accent ─────────────────────────────── */
  --color-accent:     #3B4FDB;  /* deep violet-blue, ~65% sat — NOT #0000FF */
  --color-accent-dim: #3B4FDB18;/* accent at ~10% opacity for bg washes */
  --color-accent-glow:#3B4FDB30;/* accent at ~19% opacity for glow/halos */

  /* ── Text ────────────────────────────────────── */
  --color-text:   #14141E;   /* near-black cool — 16:1+ on bg */
  --color-text-2: #42425A;   /* secondary — 7.5:1 on bg, AA */
  --color-text-3: #6A6A80;   /* tertiary — 4.7:1, use 20px+ only */

  /* ── Typography ──────────────────────────────── */
  --font-display: 'Syne', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-body:    'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-mono:    'JetBrains Mono', monospace;

  /* ── Type scale — fluid clamp, no fixed px ───── */
  --text-xs:   clamp(0.70rem,  0.9vw,  0.85rem);
  --text-sm:   clamp(0.85rem,  1.1vw,  1.00rem);
  --text-base: clamp(1.00rem,  1.4vw,  1.10rem);
  --text-lg:   clamp(1.10rem,  1.8vw,  1.30rem);
  --text-xl:   clamp(1.40rem,  2.5vw,  1.90rem);
  --text-2xl:  clamp(1.90rem,  4.0vw,  3.20rem);
  --text-3xl:  clamp(2.80rem,  7.0vw,  5.50rem);
  --text-hero: clamp(4.50rem, 11.0vw, 10.00rem);

  /* ── Spacing — 8pt grid ──────────────────────── */
  --space-xs:  clamp(0.50rem, 1.0vw, 0.75rem);
  --space-sm:  clamp(0.75rem, 1.4vw, 1.00rem);
  --space-md:  clamp(1.00rem, 2.0vw, 1.50rem);
  --space-lg:  clamp(1.50rem, 3.0vw, 2.50rem);
  --space-xl:  clamp(2.50rem, 5.0vw, 4.00rem);
  --space-2xl: clamp(4.00rem, 7.0vw, 6.00rem);
  --space-3xl: clamp(6.00rem, 10vw,  9.00rem);

  /* ── Radii ───────────────────────────────────── */
  --radius-sm:   3px;
  --radius-md:   8px;
  --radius-lg:   16px;
  --radius-pill: 100vw;

  /* ── Easing references ───────────────────────── */
  --ease-out-expo:     cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
  --ease-in-out-quart: cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1);
}
```

Typography enforcement:
- Display text: var(--font-display), weight 700 or 800, letter-spacing -0.04em
- Body text: var(--font-body), weight 300 or 400, line-height 1.65-1.75
- Mono text: var(--font-mono), weight 400, letter-spacing +0.10em, uppercase only
- All body text containers: max-width 68ch enforced
- Line-height on display: 0.92 to 1.00

Spacing enforcement:
- All spacing is 8pt multiples. Use the custom properties above.
- Optical correction: uppercase pill padding (-1px top), SplitText descenders (padding-bottom 0.15em), icon nudge (2-4px).
- No other non-8pt values anywhere.

---

## Layout Principles

Aurora is an event site, not a product site. It must feel like the opening credits of a global summit, not a SaaS landing page. Every layout decision reinforces scale and credibility.

**Unconventional structural decisions:**

1. Navigation is a single horizontal strip pinned to top with logo left and a single pill CTA right. Zero nav links visible on desktop. Links live in a full-screen overlay triggered by a minimal text button labeled "Menu" in mono, not a hamburger icon.

2. Hero is full-viewport-height. The word "AURORA" fills the entire viewport width at max-size, white-on-bg, letterforms bleeding off-screen left and right. Below it: a single line of mono text giving the event date and location. No subheading. No CTA in the hero itself. The Register CTA is below the fold, earning the click.

3. Timeline section uses a horizontal scroll-pinned track. The five stages (Idea, Prototype, Shark Tank, Ceremony, Closing) are wide cards on a pinned horizontal rail. Scroll down to move forward through the timeline. Each card has a large stage number in display weight, a mono label, a short description in body text.

4. Sponsors section is not a logo grid. It is a horizontal marquee of sponsor names in display type, not logos, alternating between full weight and outline stroke. This enforces the "plain text, no decoration" brief while making the section feel editorial.

5. Footer is full-height. Left side: oversized "AURORA 2026" in display. Right side: vertically stacked links in body weight. Accent color rule line at very top of footer.

6. Section numbers are flush-right in mono, large, muted, positioned absolutely behind the section heading. Not decorative: they are the only structural element that appears on every section.

---

## Interaction Vocabulary

### 1. Custom Cursor

Built from scratch. No library. Native cursor hidden on * with cursor: none.

```html
<div class="cursor-dot" aria-hidden="true"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" aria-hidden="true"></div>
```

```css
.cursor-dot,
.cursor-ring {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0; left: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 9998;
  border-radius: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  will-change: transform;
}
.cursor-dot  { width: 5px; height: 5px; background: var(--color-accent); }
.cursor-ring { width: 32px; height: 32px; border: 1.5px solid var(--color-accent); opacity: 0.5; }
```

```js
const cursorDot  = document.querySelector('.cursor-dot');
const cursorRing = document.querySelector('.cursor-ring');
const mouse = { x: 0, y: 0 };
const ringPos = { x: 0, y: 0 };

window.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouse.x = e.clientX;
  mouse.y = e.clientY;
  gsap.set(cursorDot, { x: mouse.x, y: mouse.y });
});

gsap.ticker.add(() => {
  ringPos.x += (mouse.x - ringPos.x) * 0.10;
  ringPos.y += (mouse.y - ringPos.y) * 0.10;
  gsap.set(cursorRing, { x: ringPos.x, y: ringPos.y });
});

document.querySelectorAll('a, button, .magnetic').forEach(el => {
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () =>
    gsap.to(cursorRing, { scale: 2.4, opacity: 1, duration: 0.35, ease: 'expo.out' }));
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () =>
    gsap.to(cursorRing, { scale: 1, opacity: 0.5, duration: 0.35, ease: 'expo.out' }));
});

document.addEventListener('mousedown', () =>
  gsap.to(cursorDot, { scale: 2.5, duration: 0.15, ease: 'power2.out' }));
document.addEventListener('mouseup', () =>
  gsap.to(cursorDot, { scale: 1, duration: 0.3, ease: 'elastic.out(1, 0.5)' }));
```

Magnetic pull on all .magnetic elements (Register CTA, Discord button, Devpost link):
```js
document.querySelectorAll('.magnetic').forEach(el => {
  const xTo = gsap.quickTo(el, 'x', { duration: 0.5, ease: 'elastic.out(1, 0.4)' });
  const yTo = gsap.quickTo(el, 'y', { duration: 0.5, ease: 'elastic.out(1, 0.4)' });
  el.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
    const r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    xTo((e.clientX - r.left - r.width / 2) * 0.38);
    yTo((e.clientY - r.top - r.height / 2) * 0.38);
  });
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { xTo(0); yTo(0); });
});
```

### 2. ScrollTrigger Scenes

Store every instance. Kill on Barba leave.

```js
const triggers = [];
barba.hooks.leave(() => { triggers.forEach(t => t.kill()); triggers.length = 0; });
```

Global scene rules:
- No two consecutive sections share the same animation pattern
- SplitText on all display headings. Hero uses char stagger. Section headings use word stagger.
- Char stagger: 0.03s, ease: "power4.out", y from 110%, parent overflow: hidden, padding-bottom 0.15em
- Word stagger: 0.09s, ease: "expo.out", y from 60px, optional blur(4px) to 0
- Image/panel entry: clip-path inset(100% 0 0 0) to inset(0% 0 0 0), never opacity alone
- All SplitText parent containers: overflow: hidden

Section-specific animations:

**HERO**
On page load (not scroll). SplitText on "AURORA" with char stagger 0.025s, y from 120%, ease: "power4.out", duration 1.1s. Stagger delay per character. The date/location mono line fades in after last character lands: opacity 0 to 1, y from 16px, duration 0.6s, ease: "expo.out". The large "AURORA" letterforms have a slow scrub:true scale from 1.0 to 1.04 as user scrolls past hero, creating a parallax zoom-in on exit. Threshold: trigger when hero 60% scrolled past.

**ABOUT AURORA**
Left column: large stat numbers (15,000+ registrations, 50+ countries, Rs 20L prize) count up from 0 using GSAP quickTo on a numeric target when section enters. Ease: "power3.out", duration 1.4s. Right column: body text paragraphs stagger in by word. Start trigger: when section top hits 80% viewport height.

**TIMELINE (horizontal scroll-pin)**
ScrollTrigger pin on the section container. The inner horizontal track animates x from 0 to -(totalWidth - viewport). scrub: 1.2. Each stage card has an independent entry: as it enters the visible area, the stage number clips up from below (clipPath inset 0 0 100% 0 to 0 0 0% 0, duration 0.5s, ease: "power3.out"). The active card in view gets a subtle left border in accent color, animated via GSAP as the scrub passes its x threshold. No card has hover state heavier than border color change.

**PRIZES**
Three prize tiers (Overall Winner, Best Design, Best Tech/Innovation). Layout: oversized prize label left (display 800), amount right in display 700. On scroll entry: each row slides in from x: 80px, opacity 0, stagger 0.14s, ease: "expo.out". The prize amount has a number scramble effect using setInterval cycling random digits for 400ms before resolving to the real value. No count-up: scramble feels more cryptic and premium.

**JUDGES / PARTNERS**
Grid of judge cards (not equal-width three-column: use asymmetric auto-fill grid with minmax(260px, 1fr)). Each card: clip-path reveal from bottom inset(100% 0 0 0) to inset(0%), stagger 0.10s, scrub: false, trigger: start of section. On hover, the card border transitions from --color-border to --color-accent, duration 0.25s. No background change. No shadow. No image zoom. Type only.

**SPONSORS**
Horizontal marquee of sponsor names, no logos. Two rows, opposite directions. Built with CSS animation as base, GSAP pauseAll/resumeAll on mouseenter/leave of the section. On section entry: both rows start at opacity 0, scale 0.97, animate to 1/1 over 0.8s, ease: "expo.out".

**REGISTER CTA**
Full-width section. Single large heading: "Build the future." in display 800. Below it: a single pill button labeled "Register Now" with class .magnetic. Button is outlined, not filled. On hover: background fills to --color-accent, text color flips to --color-bg, transition via GSAP: duration 0.3s, ease: "power2.out". Section enters with heading char stagger (same as hero, 0.025s stagger) and button fades in at opacity 0 to 1 after heading completes.

**FOOTER**
Pinned full-height section. On scroll entry: "AURORA 2026" in oversized display clips up from y: 60px, duration 0.9s, ease: "power4.out". Footer links fade in staggered 0.08s. The accent rule line at footer top draws from left via scaleX: 0 to 1, ease: "expo.out", duration 0.7s.

### 3. Click / Tap Shockwave

Canvas overlay, global. Reads accent from CSS variable.

```js
const shockCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
shockCanvas.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9997;';
document.body.appendChild(shockCanvas);
const shockCtx = shockCanvas.getContext('2d');

function resizeShock() { shockCanvas.width = window.innerWidth; shockCanvas.height = window.innerHeight; }
resizeShock();
window.addEventListener('resize', resizeShock);

document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  const accentColor = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--color-accent').trim();
  const obj = { p: 0 };
  gsap.to(obj, {
    p: 1, duration: 0.75, ease: 'expo.out',
    onUpdate() {
      const p = obj.p;
      shockCtx.clearRect(0, 0, shockCanvas.width, shockCanvas.height);
      shockCtx.beginPath();
      shockCtx.arc(e.clientX, e.clientY, p * 110, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      shockCtx.strokeStyle = accentColor;
      shockCtx.globalAlpha = (1 - p) * 0.5;
      shockCtx.lineWidth = 1.2;
      shockCtx.stroke();
      shockCtx.globalAlpha = 1;
    },
    onComplete: () => shockCtx.clearRect(0, 0, shockCanvas.width, shockCanvas.height)
  });
});
```

Shockwave rules: single ring, expands outward, fades on complete, no fill, no bounce. Fires on every click.

### 4. Page Transitions (Barba)

```html
<div class="transition-overlay" aria-hidden="true"></div>
```

```css
.transition-overlay {
  position: fixed; inset: 0;
  background: var(--color-accent);
  transform: scaleX(0);
  transform-origin: left;
  z-index: 9990;
  pointer-events: none;
}
```

Transition personality: Horizontal wipe. Editorial. The overlay sweeps left to right covering the page, then sweeps left to right uncovering the new page. Accent color overlay. Fast in (0.4s), faster out (0.5s). No content scale or blur.

```js
barba.init({
  transitions: [{
    name: 'horizontal-wipe',
    leave(data) {
      return gsap.timeline()
        .to(data.current.container, { opacity: 0, duration: 0.2, ease: 'power2.in' })
        .to('.transition-overlay', { scaleX: 1, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power4.inOut', transformOrigin: 'left' }, '-=0.1');
    },
    enter(data) {
      lenis.scrollTo(0, { immediate: true });
      return gsap.timeline()
        .set('.transition-overlay', { transformOrigin: 'right' })
        .to('.transition-overlay', { scaleX: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'expo.out' })
        .from(data.next.container, { opacity: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power3.out' }, '-=0.3');
    },
    afterEnter() { ScrollTrigger.refresh(); }
  }]
});
```

---

## Animation Rules — Always Enforced

- Every animation has a named ease. ease: "none" only for typewriter reveals.
- Timelines for 2+ moving parts. Standalone tweens for single micro-interactions only.
- will-change: transform on every animated element.
- transform: translateZ(0) on cursor, marquees, canvas elements.
- Duration minimum: 0.3s. Maximum without scroll-pin: 2.2s.
- Char stagger: 0.025s to 0.04s. Word stagger: 0.08s to 0.12s. Element stagger: 0.10s to 0.18s.
- All ScrollTrigger instances stored in triggers[] and killed on Barba leave.
- ScrollTrigger.normalizeScroll(true) set globally.
- gsap.config({ nullTargetWarn: false }) set globally.
- No animation that runs on scroll without a ScrollTrigger. No global scroll event listeners.

---

## Copy Reference — Real Content Only

Use the following real content. No Lorem Ipsum anywhere.

```
Hackathon name: Aurora
Tagline: Build the future. Present it to the world.
Hosted by: projectGRID x IIIT Delhi
Registrations target: 7,000 to 15,000 teams
Countries: 50+
Prize pool: Rs 20,00,000
Confirmed sponsor: Featherless.ai

Stage 1 — Idea and Business Round
Submissions close: 17 April 2026
200 teams shortlisted: 27 April 2026

Stage 2 — Prototyping Phase
Deadline: 4 May 2026
20 finalists announced: 9 May 2026

Stage 3 — Shark Tank Round
Date: 18 May 2026
Format: Live pitches across four tracks

Stage 4 — Prize Ceremony
Stage 5 — Closing Ceremony
Venue: IIIT Delhi
Date: 21 May 2026

Tracks: Best Design / Best Innovation / Best Tech / Overall Winner

Primary CTA: Register Now (links to Devpost Stage 1 form — replace [DEVPOST_URL] with live link)
Secondary CTA: Join Discord (replace [DISCORD_URL] with live link)
```

---

## NEVER DO THIS

This section is a hard constraint list. The IDE agent treats every item as non-negotiable.

### Color violations
- Pure #000000 as any background
- Pure #FFFFFF as any background
- Any accent with HSL saturation above 85%
- Pure primary colors as accent: #FF0000, #00FF00, #0000FF, #FFFF00, #FF00FF, #00FFFF
- Accent color applied to body copy
- Two accents that are complementary (opposite on color wheel)
- Neon color as any text
- Red and green together anywhere in the same view
- Gradient text on any text under 32px
- Any shadow using pure black rgba(0,0,0,x) — use bg-color-derived shadow instead
- Hardcoded hex values anywhere outside the :root block
- Surface lighter than the base bg in the surface stack

### Layout and structure violations
- Equal-width three-column card grid anywhere
- Centered H1 + subheading + CTA hero layout
- Hamburger icon for navigation
- Any decorative illustration, graphic, or icon pack
- Any background image, gradient overlay, or texture
- Glassmorphism effects of any kind
- Section headers that are just a bold centered H2 with no structural context
- Padding equal on all four sides of a section

### Typography violations
- Font weight 500 on body copy
- Two typeface families beyond Syne + Inter + JetBrains Mono
- System fonts (Arial, Times, Georgia) as display
- Any fixed px font size — fluid clamp only
- Body text container without max-width: 68ch
- Display text at weight below 700

### Animation violations
- AOS, ScrollReveal, Animate.css, WOW.js, or any non-GSAP animation library
- ease: "none" on any visible motion except typewriter reveals
- opacity: 0 reveal without a paired y, x, scale, or clip-path transform
- setTimeout for animation sequencing — use GSAP timeline position parameter
- transition: all — always target specific properties
- Inline styles via element.style in JS — use GSAP or CSS custom properties
- Generic loading spinner
- Emojis anywhere
- Em-dashes in any copy or UI element — use commas, colons, or line breaks
- Three.js unless a specific 3D canvas element is added to brief later
- Particle systems, confetti, or decorative canvas effects not specified above
